lessons.title: Defining Methods 🛠️
lessons.description: Learn to write reusable blocks of code called Methods.

lessons.title: Arguments and Parameters 📩
lessons.description: Make your methods flexible by feeding them outside data.

lessons.title: Default Parameters 🛡️
lessons.description: Set default values so your methods don't crash when data is missing.

lessons.title: Return Values 🎁
lessons.description: Understand Ruby's magical implicit return system.

lessons.title: Variable Scope 🔭
lessons.description: Learn where variables live and die within your methods.
